# Creator Academy Hub

Creator Academy Hub is a structured creator training website for Roblox Studio, Roblox Lua, Blender, Moon Animator, UI design, VFX, publishing, coursework, exams and creator business.

Main URL: https://www.freddiemurray.co.uk/

The website includes:
- Course Section 1: foundation-to-mastery creator training.
- Course Section 2: specialist creator training.
- Detailed sublessons.
- Homework and coursework.
- Exams and review tasks.
- XP/progress tracking.
- Paid plan access levels.
